headline: Reed’s CEO steps down, COO named interim chief
summary: Neal Cohane, who was only appointed COO in January, has been named interim chief executive officer.

raw.headline: Reed’s CEO steps down, COO named interim chief
raw.summary: Neal Cohane, who was only appointed COO in January, has been named interim chief executive officer.

headline: 3 Beaten-Down Dividend Aristocrats to Scoop Up While Wall Street Chases AI Stocks Into a Cliff
summary: Wall Street has gotten far more selective on AI stocks, but these AI stocks are still receiving the lion’s share of invested capital. Dividend Aristocrat stocks like PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL), and Beckton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) are neglected, and that’s exactly why it’s worth chasing them right now. A portion of investors have already started ... 3 Beaten-Down Dividend Aristocrats to Scoop Up While Wall Street Chases AI Stocks Into a Cliff

headline: FormFactor and Copart have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: FormFactor rides AI-driven chip demand to new highs, while Copart faces mounting cost pressures, weak earnings trends and a deepening downtrend.

raw.headline: FormFactor and Copart have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day

headline: PepsiCo hits pair of water replenishment, stewardship targets
summary: The food and beverage giant has a goal to become net water positive or replenish more water than it consumes by 2030.

raw.headline: PepsiCo hits pair of water replenishment, stewardship targets
raw.summary: The food and beverage giant has a goal to become net water positive or replenish more water than it consumes by 2030.
